fullStatBlock:
CR 1
Giant Spider
N Medium vermin
Init +3
Senses darkvision 60 ft., tremorsense 60 ft.; Perception +4
AC 14, touch 13, flat-footed 11 (+1 armor, +3 Dex)
hp 16 (3d8+3)
Fort +4, Ref +4, Will +1
Speed 30 ft., climb 30 ft.
Melee bite +2 (1d6 plus poison)
Space 5 ft.; Reach 5 ft.
Special Attacks web (+5 ranged, DC 12, hp 2)
Special Abilities Poison (Ex) Bite-injury; save Fort DC 14; frequency 1/round for 4 rounds; effect 1d2 Strength damage; cure 1 save.
Spell-Like Abilities none
Statistics Str 11, Dex 17, Con 12, Int 0, Wis 10, Cha 2
Base Atk +2; CMB +2; CMD 15
Skills Climb +16, Perception +4 (+8 in webs), Stealth +7 (+11 in webs)
Racial Modifiers +4 Perception, +4 Stealth (+8 in webs), +16 Climb
Environment  any
Organization solitary, pair, or colony (3-8)
Treasure incidental
Immune mind-affecting effects
Source PFRPG Bestiary
Description The statistics above are for a web-spinning spider. Hunting spiders lose the web ability but gain a +8 racial modifier on Acrobatics checks. All giant spiders have a +2 racial bonus on poison save DCs. Other species of giant spiders exist, as detailed below.
